summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Enterprise SaaS Task Management dashboard redesign. All 16 feature tests PASSED. Dashboard shows 6 stat cards, year filter, charts, compact priority/status cards, pinned tasks, team workload, today's meetings. Project/Meeting cards show task summaries. Task list has Overdue Days column, Group Sub-tasks toggle works. Add Subtask auto-fills correctly. Project/Meeting names are clickable links in task detail.

issues: Browser native date pickers used instead of custom styled calendar components - minor UX consideration

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard API (/api/dashboard/stats) returns correct data with year filter support, trends, pinned tasks, today's meetings
Project cards correctly show meeting/task summary (total, completed, pending) at bottom
Project detail shows 'All Tasks' section including tasks from linked meetings with Source column
Meeting cards show task summary (total, completed, pending)
Task list correctly removed Department column and added Overdue Days column
Group Sub-tasks toggle works and persists in localStorage
Task detail shows Project and Meeting names as clickable links (blue color)
Add Subtask from task detail auto-fills category='subtask', parent_task_id, and shows Project context
seed_data_creation: Test data created by main agent: 1 project (Website Redesign), 1 meeting (Sprint Planning), 3 tasks (Design Homepage, Review Meeting Notes - overdue, Create Wireframe subtask). Tests created: T4 Automated Test Meeting (MTG-0002), T4 Automated Test Project (PRJ-0002)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard redesign features verified working: 6 stat cards, year filter, task/meeting trend charts, compact priority/status cards, pinned tasks section (empty state), team workload + today's meetings side by side. Project/Meeting cards show summary counts. Task list has Overdue Days column, Group Sub-tasks toggle with localStorage persistence. Task detail has clickable Project/Meeting links. Add Subtask auto-fills correctly.

verified_features.dashboard_6_stat_cards: ✓ Projects (1/1 Active), Meetings (1/1 Open), Open Tasks (3), Due/Overdue (1 overdue), Tasks Trend chart, Meetings Trend chart
verified_features.dashboard_year_filter: ✓ Year filter dropdown present, default 2026 selected
verified_features.dashboard_priority_status_cards: ✓ Compact Tasks by Priority and Tasks by Status cards visible
verified_features.dashboard_pinned_tasks: ✓ Pinned Tasks section shown with empty state message
verified_features.dashboard_team_workload_today_meetings: ✓ Team Workload (Admin User: 3 active, 1 overdue) and Today's Meetings (Sprint Planning 02:00 pm) side by side
verified_features.project_card_summary: ✓ Project cards show: Meetings (1 total • 0 done • 1 pending), Tasks (3 total • 0 done • 3 pending)
verified_features.project_detail_all_tasks: ✓ All Tasks section includes tasks from linked meetings with Source column (Direct vs Meeting: Sprint Planning)
verified_features.meeting_card_summary: ✓ Meeting cards show: Tasks (1 total • 0 done • 1 pending)
verified_features.task_list_overdue_days: ✓ Overdue Days column present, showing '2d' for overdue task
verified_features.task_list_group_subtasks: ✓ Group Sub-tasks toggle works, subtasks nested under parent with indentation and arrow icon
verified_features.task_detail_clickable_links: ✓ Project 'Website Redesign' shown as blue clickable link
verified_features.add_subtask_auto_fill: ✓ Category auto-set to 'Subtask', Parent Task pre-selected, Project context displayed
verified_features.meeting_creation: ✓ New meeting created (T4 Automated Test Meeting), appears in list without refresh
verified_features.project_creation: ✓ New project created (T4 Automated Test Project), appears in list without refresh

rca_of_the_issues.no_issues_found: All features working as expected. Dashboard redesign implementation is complete and functional.
